stemHtml: The uplink datalink message "AT [time] CLIMB TO AND MAINTAIN [altitude]" means…

options.a: after the climb the specified altitude is to be maintained until the specified time.
options.b: after the climb the specified altitude is to be maintained from the specified time.
options.c: at the specified time the specified altitude is to be reached.
options.d: at the specified time a climb to the specified altitude is to be started and the specified altitude is to be maintained.
